question: Who is David Mazières and what is his role at the Stellar Development Foundation?

golden.answer: **David Mazières** is an SDF/Stellar **founder or co-founder**, the single author of the 2015 Stellar Consensus Protocol paper that introduced Federated Byzantine Agreement, and a Stanford computer-science professor. When observed on 2026-07-13, SDF's team-page data described him as **“Founder and Chief Scientist,”** but the rendered Leadership card showed only his name. Treat that title as a dated first-party page-data observation, not as a visibly displayed or timeless current role. He is not SDF's CEO. Early sources describe McCaleb, Joyce Kim, Mazières, network development, and foundation leadership with different scopes, so do not force an exclusive founder list.
keyFacts: Identifies Mazières as SDF/Stellar founder/co-founder and treats Founder and Chief Scientist as a dated, source-qualified title rather than a timeless current role.
Credits him as author of the SCP paper and a Stanford CS professor.
avoid: Do NOT deny Mazières founder/co-founder status, call him SDF's CEO, or present Chief Scientist as a visibly displayed timeless current title.
Do NOT describe the single-author SCP paper as merely lead-authored or impose an exclusive founder list.
golden.notes: GT-28 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: first-party SDF page data and Stanford sources identify Mazières as founder/co-founder; the SCP paper is single-authored. 2026-07-13/14 freshness repair: the team-page payload still described him as Founder and Chief Scientist, but the rendered Leadership card displayed only his name, so the title is dated and qualified. Existing ll-005 owns the empty-person-result recurrence.

sources.note: First-party team page observed 2026-07-13: embedded page data described Mazières as Founder and Chief Scientist, while the rendered Leadership card showed only his name.
Single-author SCP paper naming David Mazières and his Stellar Development Foundation affiliation; accessed 2026-07-13.
Independent Stanford profile identifies Mazières as a Stanford computer-science professor and SDF co-founder; accessed 2026-07-13.

corroboration.claim: SDF's team-page data described David Mazières as Founder and Chief Scientist when observed on 2026-07-13, but the rendered Leadership card did not visibly display that title.

evidence.note: Direct page-source and rendered-DOM comparison; the role remains page-data-only and is therefore dated.

corroboration.claim: David Mazières is an SDF co-founder, authored the single-author SCP paper, and is a Stanford computer-science professor.

evidence.note: Independent institutional profile identifies his Stanford role and SDF co-founder status.
The paper is single-authored by David Mazières and states his SDF affiliation.

verified.by: SDF organizational source audit after independent Sol and Fable review
evidence: https://stellar.org/foundation/team page source and rendered Leadership card observed 2026-07-13.
rootCause: The golden treated embedded team-page title data as visibly displayed current wording and marked the mixed claim stable.
